narrative:
Salem 2 (Oak Harbor) (precinct in Ottawa County) has 667 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.5%, a modest Republican lean of 2.1 percentage points.
